rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports; use implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Generate AGREE clauses using visible AADL identifiers and helper declarations only.
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be syntactically valid and use only visible symbols from the AADL model.
Avoid encoding AADL property values directly into AGREE expressions unless typed ports or constants are explicitly exposed.
Ensure helper declarations match the types of referenced expressions to prevent type mismatches.
Do not generate clauses that reference unresolved identifiers or invalid helper types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` syntax as per AGREE standards.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Period or Priority directly in AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants.
Do not generate Boolean range comparisons unless the data type is explicitly numeric.
